name: Peach Pound Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup peach slices in syrup, drained and sliced
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 325°F. Prepare a 12-cup Bundt® pan with cooking spray and flour; set aside. In a mixing bowl, combine 1 tablespoon flour, brown sugar, and nutmeg. Add peaches and mix until fully incorporated with the flour-sugar mixture. Spread the peach mixture around the bottom of the prepared pan. In another mixing bowl, combine granulated sugar, unbleached flour, baking powder, and baking soda. In a separate mixing bowl, combine sour cream, egg whites, and vanilla. Mix dry ingredients with wet ingredients until just combined. Pour the batter over the peach mixture. Bake for 1 hour.
